title: The Importance of Meta Analysis in Educational Research
author: Pardeep Singh Dehal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Educational research is a field of study that seeks to understand, improve, and advance the practices and outcomes within the education system. The primary goal of educational research is to expand knowledge, enhance practices, and support informed decision-making. Meta-analysis, a robust statistical method, is used to combine the findings of multiple studies on a specific topic, offering a more precise and dependable evaluation of the overall effect or relationship. This paper explores the history, concepts and steps in conducting meta-analysis. It includes numerous applications of metaanalysis in educational research, contributing to evidence-based practice and policy making in several ways. Meta-analysis offers several significant benefits in research, particularly when integrating the findings from numerous studies. The paper also discusses the challenges and limitations associated with using meta-analysis in educational research.
